channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nathan Ordaz scores, LAFC blanks Leo Messi and Inter Miami 1-0 in 1st leg of CONCACAF Champions Cup
item.description: Los Angeles FC kept Lionel Messi off the scoresheet in a 1-0 victory over Inter Miami in the first leg of their CONCACAF Champions Cup quarterfinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ohtani's walk-off homer in 9th completes rally as Dodgers stun winless Braves 6-5 for 8-0 start
item.description: Shohei Ohtani hit a tiebreaking home run in the ninth inning on his bobblehead night, lifting the unbeaten Los Angeles Dodgers over the winless Atlanta Braves 6-5.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Heat extend winning streak to 6 games and snap Celtics' 9-game streak with 124-103 victory
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Tyler Herro had 25 points and nine assists and the Miami Heat extended their season-best winning streak to six games with a 124-103 victory over the Boston Celtics on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin scores his 892nd career goal. He needs 2 to tie Gretzky and 3 to break the NHL record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin moved three goals away from breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record with No. 892 in the Washington Capitals’ game at the Carolina Hurricanes on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LaVar Arrington II following in father's footsteps
item.description: UNIVERSITY PAR, Pa. (WTAJ) -- In the late 90's LaVar Arrington starred at Penn State as an All-American linebacker. He was enshrined in the College Football Hall Of Fame and defined the legend of Penn State's number 11.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Risky, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles' celebration at Trump White House a 'good thing,' team owner says
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles team owner Jeffrey Lurie talked about what it meant to get an invite from President Donald Trump to celebrate the Super Bowl title at the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Olivia Dunne and Paul Skenes' relationship nearly never took off
item.description: Olivia Dunne and Paul Skenes opened up about their relationship and why it nearly never got off the ground, and it all has to do with social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Washington athletics org's proposals to change trans-athlete policy would violate state law, official says
item.description: Washington's high school athletics organization is unable to enact proposals that would keep biological males from girls sports because they would violate state law, an official said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coastal Carolina football fans will be able to eat for free at games in 2025
item.description: Coastal Carolina athletics announced Monday it will offer free concession stand items to fans at football home games during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Curry hits 12 3s and scores 52 as Warriors moving up in the West with a victory over the Grizzlies
item.description: The last time Stephen Curry and Golden State played in Memphis, he was held without a field goal and the Warriors lost by 51 points.
item.dc:creator: Clay Bailey, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Caleb Williams' development, Bears search for "weapons" and Kyler Gordon's contract extension with The Athletic's Kevin Fishbain
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to develop Caleb Williams and use their top draft picks to bolster their offense, while also focusing on adding a dynamic running back and working on a contract extension for Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: A's routed by Cubs 18-3 in Sacramento home opener
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) -- Carson Kelly hit for the cycle and drove in five runs, Michael Busch launched a two-run homer on the way to a career-high four RBIs, and the Chicago Cubs pounded the Athletics 18-3 on Monday night to spoil their first game in their new Northern California home.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Thunder rout Bulls 145-117 for 10th straight win, improve to 28-1 vs the East
item.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 27 points and 12 assists in just 27 minutes, and the Oklahoma City Thunder rolled to a 145-117 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Monday night for their 10th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz clinch worst record in franchise history
item.description: CHARLOTTE (ABC4 Sports) - It's official. The 2024-25 Utah Jazz will have the worst record in franchise history. Miles Bridges had 26 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Jazz 110-106 on Monday night hand Utah is 60th loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SF Giants listed among Forbes' most valuable MLB teams
item.description: (KRON) -- As the 2025 Major League Baseball season starts in March, Forbes released its annual list of the most valuable teams. The San Francisco Giants were listed as the fifth-most valuable team in MLB, according to Forbes' list released on March 26.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Diamondbacks rally for 8 runs in the eighth to beat the Cubs 10-6, split 4-game series
item.description: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. hit a game-tying, two-run homer, Josh Naylor had the go-ahead RBI double and the Arizona Diamondbacks used an eight-run eighth inning to rally past the Chicago Cubs 10-6 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four, beating Duke 54-50 in March Madness
item.description: Dawn Staley took a victory lap around the court, giving high-fives to fans and South Carolina's band and even autographing the rear end of a baby's pants.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's great D sends Blue Devils to their 18th Final Four with an 85-65 win over Alabama
item.description: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg swooped across the paint and swatted an Alabama player’s shot completely off the court. The ball landed in the stands. Flagg and the Blue Devils -- they’re headed to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Loyola Chicago men's basketball team beats Kent State, advances to NIT semifinals
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Loyola Chicago men's basketball team didn't make the 68-team NCAA Tournament field this season, but the Ramblers are still ramblin' on to a different Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: NCAA Tournament regionals: A look at Chicagoland connections, program history and more for the men's basketball Sweet 16
item.description: The 2025 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament resumes Thursday night, and it's down to the Sweet 16. It'll be the Elite Eight after the regional semifinals on Thursday and Friday and then the Final Four after the regional finals on Saturday and Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9
